calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TRANSFER TO SAN MATEO COUNTY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Petition For Change Of Venue To San Mateo County
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Additional Bond
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #6, FEES
Off Calendar Jan-21-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Cameron Miller in Propria Persona.

Mr. Miller stated that he had spoken with the Examiner regarding the venue issue and that the prior Trustee had always been in San Francisco. The Court ordered Mr. Miller to file the Petition For Change Of Venue to San Mateo County and to increase the bond to a total of $220,000.00. The Court will also allow annual distribututions rather than quarterly distributions. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). Status on filing of the Petition For Change Of Venue to San Mateo County and status on filing of the increased bond was set for February 18, 2009.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
